title: hieracium schmidtii subsp. schmidtii
intro: Hieracium schmidtii subsp. schmidtii, also known as Schmidt's hawkweed, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Hieracium schmidtii subsp. schmidtii are typically used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from skin conditions to respiratory issues.
